title: Food Safety & Temperature Control
description: Reviewed NYC Health Code requirements for hot and cold food holding temperatures. Covered proper use of thermometers and logging procedures. Demonstrated correct food rotation FIFO method. Reviewed consequences of improper holding and cross-contamination.
notes: All staff attended. Distributed updated temperature log sheets. Three staff members retested on proper thermometer sanitizing procedure.

title: Knife Safety & Slicer Operation
description: Reviewed proper handling and storage of all bladed equipment following September incident. Covered personal protective equipment requirements. Reviewed lock-out procedure for slicer cleaning. Demonstrated correct cutting technique and finger positioning.
notes: All staff attended. New cut-resistant gloves issued to all sandwich artists. Posted updated SOP for slicer cleaning at equipment station.
